summary: Practice Management feature testing completed successfully. All backend APIs (23/23 passed) and frontend UI (all tabs functional) are working correctly. The feature provides comprehensive advocate practice management including Client Management, Case/Matter Management, Document Vault, Calendar Events, Tasks, Invoicing, Expenses, and Analytics Dashboard.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/practice/analytics/dashboard - Returns summary stats (active_cases, total_clients, pending_tasks, etc.)
✅ POST /api/practice/clients - Create client successfully
✅ GET /api/practice/clients - List all clients with search functionality
✅ GET /api/practice/clients/{id} - Get single client with related data
✅ PUT /api/practice/clients/{id} - Update client
✅ DELETE /api/practice/clients/{id} - Delete client
✅ POST /api/practice/cases - Create case linked to client
✅ GET /api/practice/cases - List all cases with filters
✅ GET /api/practice/cases/{id} - Get case with related documents, tasks, events
✅ PUT /api/practice/cases/{id} - Update case status
✅ DELETE /api/practice/cases/{id} - Delete case
✅ POST /api/practice/tasks - Create task with due date
✅ GET /api/practice/tasks - List tasks with status filter
✅ PUT /api/practice/tasks/{id} - Update task status to completed
✅ POST /api/practice/events - Create calendar event
✅ GET /api/practice/events - List events
✅ PUT /api/practice/events/{id} - Update event
✅ POST /api/practice/invoices - Create invoice with line items and auto-calculate totals
✅ GET /api/practice/invoices - List invoices
✅ GET /api/practice/invoices/{id} - Get invoice with client info
✅ GET /api/practice/folders - List document vault folders (creates defaults)
✅ GET /api/practice/documents - List documents
✅ GET /api/practice/analytics/cases - Case analytics by status/type
✅ GET /api/practice/analytics/revenue - Revenue analytics
✅ GET /api/practice/expenses - List expenses with totals
✅ Frontend: Practice Management page loads at /practice
✅ Frontend: Navigation link 'Practice Management' added to advocate sidebar
✅ Frontend: Dashboard tab shows summary statistics
✅ Frontend: Clients tab displays client list with Add Client button
✅ Frontend: Cases tab displays case list with New Case button
✅ Frontend: Tasks tab with filter buttons (all, pending, in_progress, completed)
✅ Frontend: Calendar tab for events
✅ Frontend: Invoices tab showing invoice list with amounts
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_Client_*, TEST_Case_*, TEST_Task_*, TEST_Event_*). Invoice INV-20260219-5A8F created for TZS 295,000.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Practice Management feature fully implemented and tested. New MongoDB collections: clients, cases, vault_documents, vault_folders, events, tasks, invoices, expenses, templates, messages. All endpoints require authentication via Bearer token. The PracticeManagementPage.jsx contains all tab components (ClientsTab, CasesTab, DocumentsTab, CalendarTab, TasksTab, InvoicesTab, MessagesTab). Navigation link added to AdvocateDashboard.jsx at line 273. Routes configured in App.js at lines 123-124 (/practice and /practice-management).

feature_verification_summary.dashboard_analytics: PASS - Returns summary stats and financials
feature_verification_summary.client_crud: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete, Search all working
feature_verification_summary.case_crud: PASS - Create linked to client, Read with related data, Update, Delete
feature_verification_summary.document_vault: PASS - Folders and documents list working
feature_verification_summary.tasks: PASS - Create, List, Update status, Filter by status
feature_verification_summary.invoices: PASS - Create with line items, auto-calculate totals, List
feature_verification_summary.expenses: PASS - List with totals and billable amounts
feature_verification_summary.frontend_page: PASS - All tabs accessible and functional
feature_verification_summary.navigation: PASS - Practice Management link in sidebar
